reviews.review_description: I BOUGHT THIS ON OCULUS GO AND LOVED IT.  NOW THEY ARE TELLING ME I NEED TO BUY IT AGAIN FOR MY OCULUS QUEST DEVICE. IT SHOULD BE FREE IF YOU HAVE ALREADY PURCHASED IT, OR YOU SHOULD BE ABLE TO GET A REFUND. WE ARE BEING RIPPED OFF  :-(
Fun game, BUT it’s NOT easy. Using only the Oculus Go controller was very difficult to perform some objectives . There is definitely a learning curve!

reviews.review_title: Fun but the scale seems wrong.
reviews.review_description: My first impression was that I was inside and giant cockpit. It feels completely out of scale. The Spitfire is better but still seems too big. Beyond that the graphics are good and the air combat it fun.  The flight model is too simple and does not give you the feeling of flight. I’m not really sure what is missing. I find Ultrawings far more realistic despite it’s cartoony visuals.

developer_response.body:
Hello Teddytron,

thanks for your feedback! We're aware of cockpits scale in the game. The original scale was introduced to reduce the sickness in VR environment, but after more than a year of intense dogfighting and VR evolvement, that solution is becoming slightly obsolete.

We're considering changing both cockpit scales and flight model - both are in the R&D phase and we will decide soon whether we incorporate changes to the product.

We hope that our care for the Player and the product will ensure you about our intentions and we will see each other in the World of Overflight :)

reviews.review_description: Interesting experience. No throttle control sucks. Could be better.
Ww2 is a interesting war and being in that war as in a aircraft is good I got this game on sale and was happy for the price I played thrue the campaign quickly there there was more

Great game.  very short - 3 missions - about an hour.

Immerssive as hell.  If you don,t get motion sick in this game, you are good for anygame.  Takes a few tries to fully use the 360 but when you get the hang of it, it is great.  

I couldn't help thinking of real pilots in real war.

This review is directed at the creators of this game...First off I totally loved this game, it’s an absolute gem, at first I thought I would get sick from playing this but but the way you gradually set up the campaign you pick it up very quickly. Also the wrist control and positioning of the controller is key to flying comfortably and like a true ace of the sky. By the end I was flying exactly as a real pilot using my 180 cockpit view window to look to the sides and up for enemy’s or bog fire behind me, this is what truly makes this game so amazing . But the end my skills were so good I could not get enough. So here’s my comment to the creators..... like so many VR games I feel like there created prematurely. I feel like you made the game to see is people would like it and did not trust in making a full game?? WHY IS IT SO SHORT?? I beat this game in two hours, but right when it ended was when I was right getting into it and ready to take on some serious missions. There is sooo much potential here to make a full long 10 hour game filled with missions and tasks and storylines.... why are the games always abandoned??? Do you have any plans to make more missions?? Can you make a modern version using F-16, F-18 and other modern dog fighting aircraft??? Please let me know..... over all this game was one of my favourite and real experiences I have had on VR and I thank you so much but please please please believe in yourselves and make a really huge game that we can enjoy for a long time to come.
I havent been able to play with anybody online it keeps saying the servers are full it only let me create an online match but the whole time its only AIs any reason why?

I really do like this game and have only two issues with it.

I wish I had a throttle control and rudder.  It would be a great game with these two items mapped into a game controller.

The play and overall game is excellent.  I did have a little motion sickness but it was short lived. 

Playing with a game controller made it easier.

Right when I strapped in I was amazed. The cockpits are totally immersive. I was using the oculus control stick and had no problems controlling the plane. Those looking for realistic flight dynamics will be disappointed as there is no throttle control and the aircraft maintains a near constant speed no matter what maneuvers you pull off. This is more an arcade flight game than any kind of simulator. 

As for the game, it’s a lot of fun. It opens with a clever little tutorial level and moves you to dogfighting and bomber escort. But then, you are on to the final level to blow up a base - this is why I gave it four stars instead of five. The game is too short. I finished the whole thing in about an hour, and I’m sure a lot of better gamers could finish much faster than that.  Hopefully, there are more updates on the way. New missions, or chapters, with P-51s, B-17s, and P-38s would be awesome. If they can expand the campaign this game will be one of the best available for the oculus. 

The graphics are good. Not amazing, but probably the most the oculus processor can handle. In other words, the ground and clouds could be better but it doesn’t take you out of the game. The gauges in the cockpit are a bit fuzzy, but the game never really asks you to follow a certain heading- well, it does, but it’s in a cargo plane with bigger more easy to read gauges. 

The dogfighting is exciting and engaging. As far as dizziness, well it is what you make it. If you’re going to do spins and loops the whole time you might feel it, but if you focus on your targets and objectives you’ll be fine. If you’re experienced in vr it shouldn’t bother you that much. 

The bottom line is this game is one of the best vr games I’ve played. The game is awesome, totally immersive and worth the price.  The negatives are that it’s too short - it ends right when you’re committing to spending all night playing this thing. I could nitpick the graphics but I understand the oculus processor limitations. The fact that it ends on sort of a Star Wars trench run and not a more period appropriate air battle was disappointing but it didn’t take away from my enjoyment of the game. 

Definitely worth the price. Lots of fun. Hopefully there are future add-one because currently it’s just too short. But it was a very enjoyable hour.

developer_response.body:
Hi! We're glad you like Overflight! Thanks for so many information, that helps us and our community a lot!
I will talk with my team about updates, stay tuned :)

reviews.review_description: One of my newest favorite games! Love the controls!  Wish more games used this control method.

developer_response.body:
Hi Gannan!
Thank you for appreciation! Is there something we can do so you could give us 5 stars? :)

reviews.review_title: Super fun for 15 minutes at a time
reviews.review_description: This game needs to be played in parts as the nausea that sweeps over you is incredible. Otherwise, graphics are cool and dog fights are fun.

Impressive ! I really enjoyed playing this game. Controls are quite difficult at the beginning but it is really immersive. Campaign is really short with only 3 chapters. But I Guess that devs will provide us new content. Last thing, I felt motion sickness after 2 hours
In conclusion, this is a most have with strong potential

Overall, it's decent. It's probably the best fighter plane game on the market for the gear and go. Campaign was a bit shorter than I had hoped for. 
Enemy planes are too slow and absolutely want to be behind you, resulting in in a circus of planes doing 360's until 'you' have to stop because of g-force overload. Which is okay I guess since it forces you to change your tactic. 

Something I wish it had was to have the go/gear controller facing up towards my ceiling so it might feel more authentic.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thank you for the extensive feedback! All of this is noted. I will talk with the team to see what we can do about updates, please be patient :)

reviews.review_description: i thought the game was great
It's almost all dogfighting. The planes handle well. There's no throttle control. I beat the campaign in 2 days, and then asked, "Is that all?"
This is a great game, but after week with headset off the game won't run getting stuck at Verifying License! Help!

developer_response.body:
Hello steve.nicklin,
sorry for your inconvenience regarding Overflight. Please specify the platform at feedback@gamedust.co to speed up the support process. We will try our best to resolve your issue asap.

reviews.review_description: I purchased the game thinking it would be just another run if the mill flight sim. Wrong, I have one word to describe it...AWSOME!!! There are a few complaints about the graphics for the ground, yeah they may not be really crisp, but who the hell is looking at the ground? I’m trying to shoot the other 3 planes out of the sky! I love the way you can look up and use the controller to make a loop and get at the planes behind you. Great game and hats off to the developers!!! 5 stars for a very addicting game!

This is great fun, but not a realistic flight sim as far as aircraft dynamics are concerned. I managed to loop in pursuit of what I assumed to be a yak 9  fourteen times continuously and didn’t stall. If you want to feel like you’re in a dogfight though, definitely have a crack at this one. It even made me feel physically like I was pulling some G’s.

The game itself is pretty cool. I like the idea of a ww1 fighter plane game. I wish the game was better nonetheless. The pros are that it was cool to fly an airplane and the start of the game is very impressive. Cons are that as the game progresses, it gets super boring and repetitive, i could hardly follow the story and it began to make me feel quite nauseous which has never happened to me in a VR game before. Overall i DO reccomend it, it’s just not the best.
